name: executing-tasks
description: Execute an approved implementation plan safely. Use when a plan or task list already exists.

---

# Executing Tasks

Use this skill to implement an approved plan without drifting from it.

## Process

1. Read the plan once and extract the tasks.
2. Work in task order unless the plan explicitly permits parallel work.
3. For each task, implement only the requested behavior.
4. Run the verification listed for the task.
5. Record what changed, what was verified, and what remains.

## Stop Conditions

Stop and ask for direction if the plan is contradicted by repository facts, requires new product decisions, or would force unsafe changes.
